_comment: CITRIS-VAE config for the REAL mouse-reach opto dataset (Dataset4-opto). Adjusted from keypoints_example.json for the real data's characteristics: only 79 trials / ~4833 train pairs (small), opto is well balanced (52% ON vs the synthetic set's 16%), trial lengths vary widely (19-908 frames), and there is no trial_session key so we split by whole trials. D=76 (38 DLC keypoints x [x,y], two camera views); keypoints_name is auto-expanded from 38 to 76 in validate_data. Values are percentile-normalized and shifted to ~[-0.5,0.5] (Gaussian decoder, no sigmoid, so no re-normalization needed).
